title: Why this chronicle matters now
summary: The point of the page is not to memorialize an old enterprise-security run. It is to argue that Sean Xiang's long build becomes newly legible in the AI-infrastructure era, where data-at-rest protection, cryptographic trust, and accelerator-era architecture have to meet again.

signals.label: Long-cycle credibility
signals.text: The Bloombase record shows repeated interoperability and alliance milestones across more than one infrastructure generation — from Dell, Hitachi, and IBM in the mid-2010s to VMware Cloud on AWS, Azure Marketplace, and NVIDIA DPUs in the 2020s.

signals.label: Post-quantum cryptography at GTC 2024
signals.text: Sean Xiang participated as a panelist at NVIDIA GTC 2024, discussing AI-era cyber defense alongside executives from NVIDIA, Qrypt, and Reality Defender. Bloombase demonstrated post-quantum cryptography encryption powered by NVIDIA GPU, DPU, and Morpheus AI at the event.

signals.label: 2025 alliance and standards membership
signals.text: The 2025 Utimaco alliance integrates Bloombase StoreSafe with NIST FIPS 140-2 Level 3 certified HSM key protection and OASIS KMIP-compliant key management. Bloombase also joined the PKI Consortium in November 2024, deepening its standards-level credibility.
